message:
chore(beads): audit & revise E2E bead graph (IvoryWaterfall)

- Fix dep graph: remove incorrect deps on top-level epics (bd-z0xm),
  sub-epics (bd-16nm, bd-3w2q), and downstream scenarios from
  infrastructure beads (bd-2zkh, bd-14jn, bd-1opl, bd-2bpb, bd-1odl,
  bd-dcjy)
- Add critical dep: bd-2bdw → bd-1w6k.2.2 (compat persistence needed
  for comparison backend to read real SQLite files)
- Add cross-reference comments to 6 overlapping bd-1w6k beads
  (bd-1w6k.4.2, 4.3, 5.1, 7.1) and 2 bd-z0xm beads (bd-3rze, bd-244z)
- Add revision comments to bd-72im, bd-qwqr, bd-2r4z (existing beads)
- Add detailed implementation spec to bd-2mhe (mismatch debugger)
- Close bd-2u1t as duplicate of bd-3ee2 (already closed by EmeraldMeadow)
- Ready count increased from 20 to 28 after dep fixes
- No cycles, graph healthy: 86 open, 529 closed, 615 total

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
